news.headline: BD appoints Pamela Spikner as Chief Accounting Officer and Controller on Jan 10, 2025. She will start on Jan 20.
news.summary: A prominent medical technology company, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), based in Franklin Lakes, N.J., disclosed on Jan. 10, 2025, that Pamela Spikner is appointed as the senior vice president, chief accounting officer, and controller, starting on January 20. BD is listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol BDX. This new appointment highlights the company's commitment to strengthening its financial leadership team.

news.headline: Ronald S. Lauder retiring from The Estée Lauder Companies' Board of Directors (NYSE: EL). Daughter Jane Lauder remains; son-in-law appointed as director.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made by The Estée Lauder Companies, Ronald S. Lauder is stepping down from the Company's Board of Directors (NYSE: EL) with immediate effect. According to the stockholders' agreement with the Lauder family and the Company, Mr. Lauder has the privilege to nominate two directors. Jane Lauder, his daughter, will retain her current position on the Board. Eric Zinterhofer, Mr. Lauder's son-in-law and married to his daughter, has been appointed as a new member of the Board.

news.headline: US stock futures declined before Friday's crucial jobs data with all major indices falling slightly. Important numbers: Nasdaq 100 -0.03%, S&P 500 -0.08%, Dow Jones -0.01% in premarket trading. Unemployment expected to stay at 4.2%. 10-year Treasury at 4.70%, 2-year at 4.29%. Initial jobless claims at an 11-month low with private companies adding 122,000 jobs in Dec. Markets were mixed on Wed with Dow up over 100 points.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures fell ahead of the release of December's non-farm payroll data, with all major indices decreasing in premarket trade. Economists predict a softening in job growth compared to November, expecting the unemployment rate to stay at 4.2%. Treasury notes had yields of 4.70% and 4.29% for 10-year and two-year notes, respectively. Futures for Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 were down by 0.03%, 0.08%, 0.01%, and 0.17%, respectively. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was at $589.31, down 0.03%, while the Invesco QQQ Trust ETF was at $514.97, down 0.058% in premarket trading. The Dow Jones gained over 100 points with uncertainty in Fed minutes about future rate cuts, and Acuity Brands Inc. reported lower revenue for Q1. Initial jobless claims decreased to an 11-month low, indicating a tightening labor market. Consumer staples, healthcare, and materials sectors led gains in the S&P 500, while energy and communication services sectors saw declines.

news.headline: Emulsifiers market set to reach $8.19 billion by 2029 per MarketsandMarkets™ report, covering various industries.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida on January 10, 2025, a new report was released on the Emulsifiers Market. This report covers various aspects of the market including sources (Bio-based, Synthetic), products (Lecithin, Ionic, Chemical Composition, Physical State), applications (Food, Cosmetics & Personal Care, Oilfield Chemicals, Pharmaceutical, Agrochemicals), and regions. The report provides insights into the market trends and forecasts for the future. It analyzes the market based on these factors and projects growth in key sectors such as food, cosmetics, pharmaceuticals, and agrochemicals. This analysis is crucial for stakeholders looking to invest in the emulsifiers market, which is expected to witness significant growth in the coming years.

news.headline: Strategas’ Verrone warns against pushing luck on even higher yields. Stay cautious amid market fluctuations.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in the last five years. The report also highlighted an increase in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs added to the economy in the last quarter. This significant improvement in the job market has been attributed to various economic recovery measures implemented by the government. Additionally, the report indicated that the average hourly earnings have seen a 3% increase compared to the previous year. Experts are optimistic about the future of the job market and are hopeful that this positive trend will continue in the coming months.

news.headline: Lindsay Corp declares $0.36 quarterly dividend, payable Feb 28, to ~10.9M shareholders as of Jan 6, 2025.

This dividend is set to be paid out on February 28, 2025, to shareholders on record as of the market close on February 14, 2025. As of January 6, 2025, the company had roughly 10.9 million shares in circulation, which are actively traded on the New York Stock Exchange.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price has dipped from $108,135 to $93,100, sparking questions about its future under the incoming Trump administration. Industry experts weigh in on whether this is a temporary correction or a significant market shift. Key factors include U.S. economic data, the Federal Reserve's rate cuts expectation, market participants' activity, and technical analysis. Important bullish indicators include steady ETF inflows, growing institutional adoption, and strong market infrastructure. CEO Anastasija Plotnikova views the current situation as a "healthy correction" within a broader bull cycle.
news.summary: Bitcoin's price has dipped from its all-time high of $108,135 on Dec. 17 to around $93,100, raising concerns about the market's direction under the incoming Trump administration. Industry experts like Patrick Liou and Bradley Howell attribute the dip to factors like strong U.S. economic data triggering a sell-off in risk assets and the Federal Reserve's rate cut expectations. However, Julian Beltran views the drop as natural profit-taking, pointing to positive indicators like ETF inflows and institutional adoption as reasons for optimism. Anastasija Plotnikova sees the current situation as a healthy correction within the broader bull cycle, citing concerns over sticky inflation and U.S. economic resilience.

news.headline: After being banned, TikTok may vanish from app stores. Its availability to users remains uncertain.
news.summary: The popular social media app may soon be removed from Google and Apple app stores. There is uncertainty regarding whether users will lose access to the app permanently.

news.summary: The latest data reveals a steady rate of hiring at the top level, however, other figures indicate a downturn in the labor market. This includes a decrease in available job positions and an increase in the length of time job seekers are unemployed for.

news.headline: Concerns rise over Austria's far-right movement. Keep an eye on the situation as numbers continue to grow.
Trump vows to expand oil drilling to power AI boom, stating need for twice the current electricity; plans to support AI innovation and boost energy infrastructure.
news.summary: In a recent address, President-elect Donald Trump outlined his economic vision, emphasizing artificial intelligence and drilling expansion. Trump expressed his commitment to fostering AI innovation by encouraging private investments in data centers and energy infrastructure. He highlighted the growing demand for electricity, stating that at least double the current supply will be needed for AI advancements. Trump proposed increasing U.S. energy production to meet this demand and keep energy costs low to support future industries. He criticized Biden's offshore drilling ban as detrimental to America's economic potential and vowed to overturn the policy once in office. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Fed plans to hold rates despite weak job report, requires further evidence of labor market decline.
news.summary: Federal Reserve officials have indicated that they require more than a single unfavorable report to be persuaded that the labor market is declining.

news.headline: Delta Air Lines reported record financial results for December quarter and full year 2024, including revenue of $15.6 billion and operating income of $1.7 billion in Q4. For FY 2024, they achieved $61.6 billion in revenue and $6.0 billion in operating income. They plan to deliver earnings of over $7.35 per share and free cash flow exceeding $4 billion for 2025. Profit sharing of $1.4 billion will be distributed to employees. December quarter had operating cash flow of $1.9 billion, and full year results include operating cash flow of $8 billion and $3.4 billion of free cash flow. Delta also shared performance highlights and future plans in various areas like operations, customer experience, and environmental initiatives.
news.summary: Delta Air Lines reported a record December quarter revenue of $15.6 billion and a pre-tax income of $1.2 billion. For the full year 2024, they achieved revenue of $61.6 billion, $5 billion of pre-tax income, $8 billion operating cash flow, and $3.4 billion free cash flow. The company expects earnings of over $7.35 per share and free cash flow exceeding $4 billion for 2025. They anticipate revenue growth of 7 to 9 percent in the March quarter with earnings ranging from $0.70 to $1.00 per share. Delta credits its success to industry-leading operational and financial performance, focusing on profitability and efficiency, and expects continued growth and financial strength in the future. Key highlights include significant revenue growth, diversified revenue streams, and strong international performance. Delta also emphasized its commitment to customer service, enhancing its customer experience and loyalty programs while maintaining a strong focus on environmental, social, and governance initiatives.

Global Blue reports strong tax free shopping performance in continental Europe in December 2024. Sales increased by 20%, with a 22% rise in shoppers, and GCC shopper Tax Free Spend leading with 41% growth.
news.summary: In Signy, Switzerland, a report reveals a strong performance in international shopping across continental Europe in December 2024. Sales in stores increased by +20% compared to the previous year, surpassing the growth seen in November which was at +16%. The notable growth was primarily driven by a +22% increase in the number of shoppers. However, there was a slight decrease of -2% in the average spend per shopper. When analyzing the origin markets, GCC shopper Tax Free Spend stood out with a significant increase of +41% compared to the previous year.

PacBio and Intus Bio partner to launch GutID, first at-home microbiome test, using Titan-1 platform & HiFi Sequencing, superior accuracy.
news.summary: In Menlo Park, California on January 10, 2025, PacBio and Intus Bio introduced GutID, the inaugural human gut health test. This test, powered by Intus Bio’s Titan-1 platform and PacBio’s HiFi sequencing technology, marks a significant advancement in microbiome research. Integrating Intus Bio’s strain-level resolution assay and AI-driven analysis with PacBio’s sequencing precision, GutID establishes a new standard in gut microbiome testing. This test stands out as the sole comprehensive and precise gut microbiome test currently on the market.

news.headline: Corus Entertainment reports Q1 results: 12% revenue decrease, 30% segment profit decrease, and $11.9 million net income.
news.summary: Corus Entertainment Inc. reported a 12% decrease in consolidated revenue and a 30% decrease in consolidated segment profit for the quarter ending November 30, 2024. The net income attributable to shareholders was $11.9 million, with a negative free cash flow of $10.1 million. The company launched two new lifestyle channel brands, Flavour Network and Home Network, and announced its winter 2025 lineup. Despite the decrease in financial metrics, the company remains focused on cost reductions and strengthening its balance sheet. Additionally, Corus saw a 24% increase in total hours streamed across streaming platforms and an increase in overall share of viewing. The company expects further declines in advertising revenue in the second quarter of fiscal 2025 but plans to implement additional cost reduction initiatives to mitigate these challenges. Management cautions that the operating performance of the company may be affected by economic conditions and industry risks.

news.headline: Aura Minerals Inc. achieved 66,473 gold equivalent ounces in Q4 2024, meeting production guidance. Almas had an 11% increase.
news.summary: Aura Minerals Inc., a mining company, recently disclosed its preliminary production figures for Q4 2024 from its active mines in Aranzazu, Apoena (EPP), Minosa (San Andres), and Almas. The total production for Q4 2024 was 66,473 gold equivalent ounces ("GEO"), a slight decrease of 1% from the previous quarter but consistent with the same period last year at consistent metal prices. Noteworthy highlights from the quarter include Almas, which achieved a production record with an 11% increase from the previous quarter, surpassing annual guidance. Additionally, Minosa exceeded its annual guidance targets during this period.

news.headline: Mersana Therapeutics reports positive clinical data for Emiltatug Ledadotin (XMT-1660) in Phase 1 trial, initiating expansion in TNBC. Exciting responses seen in patients with TNBC, with confirmed responses across enrolled tumor types. Expansion cohort started in TNBC patients previously treated with topo-1 ADCs, with dose exploration in progress. Expected 2025 milestones and focus areas outlined. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Emiltatug ledadotin shows favorable tolerability with a distinct safety profile. Encouraging clinical outcomes are evident in patients with triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC) previously exposed to topoisomerase-1 inhibitor ADCs, with positive responses seen in all tumor types studied. A new cohort targeting TNBC patients who have undergone at least one topo-1 ADC treatment has been initiated, and dosage investigations are ongoing. The company has disclosed anticipated milestones and key areas of attention through 2025. A conference call will be held today at 8:30 a.m. ET.

Li-Cycle enhanced its reputation as a top choice for lithium-ion battery recycling partnerships, particularly with major clients in the battery supply chain industry, such as EV OEMs. Through these collaborations, the company solidified its position in the market.
